title: Coach
greeting: Hi! Tell me what would help you train well this week — feeling fresher, fitting life around the plan, adding a little confidence, or handling a niggle — and I'll suggest a safe adjustment. You'll always see the change before anything is applied.

examples.fresh: Help me feel fresh for this weekend
examples.extraDay: I have an extra day to train
examples.moveLongRun: Move my long run to Sunday

fallback.noValidAdjustment: I couldn't find an adjustment that keeps your plan within the app's training rules — nothing was changed.
fallback.noChangeNeeded: Nothing in the plan needs to change for that.
fallback.applied: Done — your plan is updated. Anything else?

errors.noProposedPlan: Coach response did not include a proposed plan.
errors.noProposalReady: No coach proposal is ready to apply.
errors.confirmNoPlan: Coach confirmation did not include a plan.
errors.revalidateFailed: The proposal no longer validates — nothing was applied.

toast.feedbackFailed: Couldn't send feedback — try again in a moment

memory.prompt: Remember this for future coach chats?

flag.placeholder: What did the coach get wrong?

footer: Your coach uses your message, plan, recent runs, and saved memory to answer. See our <1>privacy policy</1> and <3>safety note</3>.

input.placeholder: e.g. help me feel fresh for this weekend
